sentence: شْلَونَك الْيَوم؟ اِنْتَ زَين وَالْأَهَل زَينِين؟
raw: شلونك اليوم؟ انت زين والأهل زينين؟
ipa: ˈʃloːnak alˈjoːm ˈʔinta ˈzeːn ˈwalʔahal zeːˈniːn
gloss_en: How are you today? Are you well and the family well?
notes: šlōnak Gulf greeting; zēn 'good' (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); monophthong ō/ē

sentence: اَلْبَحَر هَادِي الْيَوم وَالْهَوَا رُطُب فِي الْمَنَامَة.
raw: البحر هادي اليوم والهوا رطب في المنامة.
ipa: ˈalbaħar ˈhaːdiː lˈjoːm ˈwalhawaː ˈrutˤub fiː lmaˈnaːma
gloss_en: The sea is calm today and the air is humid in Manama.
notes: Gulf maritime frame; long vowels aː/uː; ta marbuta pausal -a; Eastern-Arabian long-vowel/emphatic phonology per (albalushi2016)

sentence: مَا أَبْغَى قَهْوَة، عَطْنِي چَاي حَارّ.
raw: ما أبغى قهوة، عطني چاي حار.
ipa: maː ˈʔabɣaː ˈɡahwa ˈʕɑtˤniː ˈtʃaːj ˈħaːrr
gloss_en: I don't want coffee, give me hot tea.
notes: abɣā 'I want' (Gulf); imperative ʕaṭni; چ=/tʃ/ affricated kaf (alshammari2026); ق=/ɡ/ gahwa

sentence: اِشْتَرَيت ثَلَاث كَيلُوَات سِمَچ مِن السُّوق بِدِينَارَين.
raw: اشتريت ثلاث كيلوات سمچ من السوق بدينارين.
ipa: ʔiʃtaˈreːt θaˈlaːθ keːluˈwaːt ˈsimatʃ min asˈsuːɡ bidiːnaːˈreːn
gloss_en: I bought three kilos of fish from the market for two dinars.
notes: simač affricated k (alshammari2026); interdental ث retained; ق=/ɡ/ sūg (Gulf g-qaf); monophthong ē in دينارين

sentence: هَاذِي السَّيَّارَة الْجِدِيدَة مَال جَارْنَا الظَّابِط.
raw: هاذي السيارة الجديدة مال جارنا الظابط.
ipa: ˈhaːðiː ssajˈjaːra ldʒiˈdiːda ˈmaːl ˈdʒaːrnaː ðˤˈðˤɑːbitˤ
gloss_en: This new car belongs to our neighbour the officer.
notes: māl genitive exponent (Gulf, albalushi2016); ذ retained in hāði; ظ=/ðˤ/; geminate يّ

sentence: هَذَا مُو صَحِيح، أَنَا مَا قُلْت چِذِي.
raw: هذا مو صحيح، أنا ما قلت چذي.
ipa: ˈhaðaː muː sˤɑˈħiːħ ˈʔanaː maː ˈɡult ˈtʃiðiː
gloss_en: That's not right, I didn't say so.
notes: muː nominal negator + čiði 'like this' (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); q=/g/ gult; ch=/tS/ affricated kaf (alshammari2026)

sentence: الْيَوم الْجَو حَار وَاجِد وَمَا فِي هَوَا.
raw: اليوم الجو حار واجد وما في هوا.
ipa: alˈjoːm ˈaldʒoː ˈħaːr ˈwaːdʒid wamaː fiː ˈhawaː
gloss_en: Today the weather is very hot and there is no wind.
notes: wajid 'very' + ma fi 'there is no' (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); aw->oo monophthong; jim=/dZ/

gloss_en: How much is the kilo of shrimp today?
notes: bikam price question + mal genitive exponent + rubyan 'shrimp' (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); keelo spelt with ay->ee to avoid loanword k-affrication

gloss_en: The appointment is tomorrow at ten in the morning.
notes: bachir 'tomorrow' with kaf->/tS/ affrication (alshammari2026); aw->oo in moocid; sun-assim sad

sentence: اِحْنَا سَاكْنِين فِي الْمُحَرَّق مِن زَمَان.
raw: احنا ساكنين في المحرق من زمان.
ipa: ˈʔiħnaː saːkˈniːn fiː lmuˈħarraɡ min zaˈmaːn
gloss_en: We have been living in Muharraq for a long time.
notes: ihna 1pl pronoun + sakin active participle for ongoing state (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); geminate rr in Muharraq

sentence: سِير سِيدَة وَبَعْدَين لِف يَمِين عِنْد الْمَسْجِد.
raw: سير سيدة وبعدين لف يمين عند المسجد.
ipa: ˈsiːr ˈsiːda wabaʕˈdeːn ˈlif jaˈmiːn ˈʕind alˈmasdʒid
gloss_en: Go straight then turn right at the mosque.
notes: sir (imperative of sar) + sida 'straight' + lif 'turn' (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); ay->ee in bacdeen

gloss_en: The lunch was very delicious yesterday.
notes: wajid 'very' post-nominal intensifier (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); interdental dhal retained ladhidh

gloss_en: Where did you put the keys? I do not know.
notes: win 'where' + ma adri 'I do not know' (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); geminate TT + ay->ee haTTeet; wayn ee-spelling avoided (word-initial way engine seam); respelled وَيْن — the sukūn-gated grapheme yields the cited weːn

gloss_en: How many children do you have?
notes: kam + cindak possessive (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); plain kaf before back vowel, no affrication

gloss_en: If you cannot come, tell me.
notes: idha conditional + tigdar 'you can' with q=/g/ + khabbirni imperative (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); geminate bb

gloss_en: I went to the market yesterday, I bought clothes.
notes: riht + hdum 'clothes' (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); q=/g/ sug; waaw dropped before wasl to avoid the waa-mater seam

gloss_en: Tomorrow I will travel to Saudi by car.
notes: bachir 'tomorrow' (kaf->/tS/, alshammari2026) + b-ruh future/intent prefix (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); geminate yy

gloss_en: I called you but you did not answer.
notes: digg 'to phone/knock' + bas 'but/only' + radd 'answer' (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); geminates gg/dd + ay->ee

gloss_en: Hello! How are you?
notes: hala greeting + sh-akhbarak 'what is your news' analytic interrogative (Gulf koine, albalushi2016)

gloss_en: What is past is dead (let bygones be bygones).
notes: illi relativizer proverb (Gulf koine, albalushi2016); geminate ll; long aa fat/mat
